items.x: Quick-switch buttons in the menu-bar popover — up to five color-coded emoji buttons under Stop/Switch jump straight to your most-worked projects.
"＋ New project…" in the chip popover (⌘N) and the menu bar's Switch menu — create a project without hunting through Settings.
Show chip toggle — hide the floating timer entirely; sessions keep running and the menu bar still shows progress.
New Settings sections with live previews — Menu Bar, Chip, App Icon, and Screen Glow each get their own sidebar page with a rendering of what they control.
Hide Dock icon — run DeepTime as a menu-bar-only app (Settings → App Icon).
Screen glow toggle — turn the under-menu-bar session glow on or off.
Picking an emoji while creating a project works again — the focus screen no longer eats the picker's clicks.
Editing a project's emoji and color together now saves both — previously only the last change stuck.
The beta-Telegram invite's ✕ now hides it everywhere, including Settings.
Fixed a crash when dismissing the beta-Telegram invite with its ✕ inside a popover.
Edit any project after creation — a pencil button in Settings → Projects opens a full editor for name, emoji, and color; "Change color…" also joins the right-click menu in the focus picker.
Menu bar pill styles — Project color, Monochrome, or High contrast (Settings → Chip).
A "Join the Beta on Telegram" invite in the popovers and picker — subtle shimmer, dismissible forever with its ✕, always findable again in Settings.
The floating pill is now called the Chip, with its own explained section in Settings.
A single Settings window with a sidebar (Goals · Focus · Projects · Pill · Connections · Log · Data · Updates) — replaces the old Preferences tabs and "Settings + Log".
"End an idle session after" setting (2 / 3 / 10 / 30 min, default 3).
Reassign a session's project when editing it in the Log.
Join the beta on Telegram — a link in the menu-bar popover and a subtle one at the bottom of the focus picker, straight into the testers group.
